title: ModelSweepOutput
description: Plan artifact produced by the generate-model command's planning sweep. Written by Claude before execution threads spawn; read by the generating-model skill to decide skip/test-only/generate per table.

epoch.description: Unix epoch seconds at which the sweep was run.

tables.description: One entry per FQN in the batch.

shared_staging_candidates.description: Source table FQNs referenced by 2+ SPs in this batch. Staging models for these are written by the sweep before agents spawn.

shared_staging_files_written.description: Paths of stg_*.sql files written during the sweep (relative to dbt project root). Empty if all shared staging files already existed on disk.

writer.description: Selected writer procedure FQN from scoping.selected_writer. Null if not set.

source_tables.description: Source tables read by the writer (is_selected=true, is_updated=false).

existing_stg_models.description: Names of stg_*.sql files already on disk for this table's source tables.

existing_mart_model.description: Path of the mart model SQL file if it already exists on disk, else null.

test_status.description: Test status derived from dbt/target/run_results.json. 'passing' = all matched results have status=pass. 'failing' = any matched result has status=fail or error. 'none' = no results found for this model.

recommended_action.description: skip = mart exists + tests passing. test-only = mart exists + tests not passing. generate = no mart model.
